OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON APR-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01
#3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY/CSR, ALEONG/CLERK - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE SUBMITTED BY BOTH SIDES; CASE SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT RICHARD DIBERNARDO, PROVIDED THAT DEFENDANT PAY THE SUM OF $2273.25 TO PLAINTIFF ROGER BAYLOCQ OR HIS AGENT ON OR BEFORE APRIL 9, 1996 AT 4:30P.M. IN THE EVENT THAT JUDGMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $2273.25 IS NOT PAID TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN THE TIME SET FORTH ABOVE, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 2621A - 18TH ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, RENT AND DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2273.25, AND COSTS AS PER COST BILL.
